name: PancakeSwap V3
special_mechanism_summary: Concentrated liquidity (Uniswap V3 fork) with custom fee tiers (0.01%, 0.05%, 0.25%, 1%) and per-position liquidity tracking. BSC's 3-second block time makes TWAP manipulation cheaper than Ethereum (shorter blocks reduce the cost to sustain price deviation), and TWAP price output is consumed by Venus Protocol as a secondary oracle.
notes: C3' combination potential: BSC 3-second block time means sustained 1-2 minute price deviation on PancakeSwap V3 can influence Venus oracle prices affecting liquidation thresholds; JIT (just-in-time) liquidity provision is applicable — positions placed just-in-time near current tick can front-run large swaps and capture near-all fees, a well-known MEV pattern from Ethereum Uniswap V3.
